notes: CAN addresses sourced from Toyota TIS, community reverse-engineering, and known Techstream mappings. Physical addressing uses 11-bit CAN IDs. Request side: 0x7Ex (tester). Response side: 0x7Ex + 0x08 (ECU reply). Functional broadcast address: 0x7DF.

ecus.name: Engine Control Module
ecus.notes: Supports standard OBD2 Mode 01-09 + Toyota enhanced services

ecus.name: Skid Control ECU (ABS/VSC/TRAC)
ecus.description: ABS, Vehicle Stability Control, Traction Control
ecus.notes: Also handles hill-start assist and trailer sway control on late models. EPB DID 0xC200 and SAS Routine 0x0200 both accessed here.

ecus.name: Suspension Control ECU
ecus.description: Kinetic Dynamic Suspension System (KDSS) hydraulic controller
ecus.notes: Shared address with KDSS on GX460; on LX570 may be separate

ecus.name: KDSS Control ECU
ecus.description: KDSS pump, accumulator, and valve management
ecus.notes: GX 460 KDSS is integrated into the suspension ECU module. Same physical address as SUSPENSION key.

ecus.name: Height Control ECU (Rear Air Suspension)
ecus.description: Rear air suspension height control — 2022 GX 460 Luxury/Luxury+
ecus.notes: Height calibration required after: suspension work, sensor replacement, ride height complaints, or ECU replacement. Address 0x7A0 confirmed on J200 platform 2014+ with AVS.

ecus.name: Adaptive Variable Suspension ECU (AVS)
ecus.description: Adaptive damper control — GX 460 Sport/Luxury AVS shocks
ecus.notes: Separate from air suspension height control. Calibration needed after shock replacement.

ecus.name: Body ECU (Smart Junction Box / BCM)
ecus.description: Power windows, locks, lighting, keyless entry, power tailgate

ecus.name: Airbag Sensing and Diagnostic Module
ecus.description: SRS airbags, seatbelt pre-tensioners, occupant detection

ecus.name: Combination Meter Assembly
ecus.description: Instrument cluster, odometer, fuel gauge, warning indicators

ecus.name: Central Gateway ECU
ecus.description: CAN gateway between HS-CAN and MS-CAN buses

ecus.name: TPMS Receiver / Controller
ecus.description: Tire Pressure Monitoring System — direct sensors
ecus.notes: Sensor IDs must be programmed after tire rotation or sensor replacement

ecus.name: Cruise Control / PCS ECU
ecus.description: Adaptive cruise control, pre-collision system (late models)
